title: Designing AI Agent Loops: How to Automate Your Workflow
hook: Most teams still manually check tasks that AI agents could handle autonomously, but agent loops can change that.
partner_takeaway: Readers learn how to structure AI agent loops with schedules, goals, and subagents to automate tasks and reduce manual oversight.
reasoning: Agent loops are a practical, actionable topic for audiences seeking immediate AI workflow upgrades. The source offers concrete guidance, matching the track's tactical focus.

title: Open Source AI Models: Why GLM-5.2 Signals a Shift
hook: GLM-5.2 just passed the community vibe check, and open source models are catching up to GPT faster than most realize.
partner_takeaway: Readers learn why open source AI models like GLM-5.2 are now viable alternatives to proprietary models, and what this means for industry adoption.
reasoning: Industry audiences are watching the battle between closed and open AI models. This week’s signal is timely, and the opinion format lets the writer add perspective on market implications.

title: Shipping X to Production: Lessons from My First Live AI Deployment
hook: The first time I shipped X to production, I learned that real-world AI deployments rarely go as planned.
partner_takeaway: Readers learn practical lessons from the writer’s first production AI launch, including what worked, what didn’t, and how to avoid common mistakes.
reasoning: Building in public posts resonate when they share real, recent experiences. This story offers concrete, actionable lessons, and fits the track’s framing perfectly.

title: A Pattern I Keep Coming Back To: My Go-To AI Workflow
hook: No matter how many AI tools I try, there’s one workflow I keep returning to—and it consistently delivers results.

reasoning: Short, tactical posts drive engagement and utility. This idea draws from the writer’s lived experience, offering readers a practical pattern they can use this week.

title: How AI Is Reshaping E-Commerce: New Models and Logistics
hook: AI-driven distribution and automation are forcing e-commerce businesses to rethink how they reach customers and manage logistics.
partner_takeaway: Readers learn how AI is changing e-commerce strategies, from distribution models to customer acquisition and logistics, and what to watch for next.
reasoning: This trend is timely and actionable for industry readers. The opinion format lets the writer synthesize the week’s signal into a forward-looking market read.
